positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a giant, mystical flora centerpiece, featuring bioluminescent mushrooms, stylized ferns, and intertwined glowing vines. The composition should be highly detailed and circular (mandala-like), framed by elegant, symmetrical jungle foliage. Use a palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, vibrant teal, and glowing gold accents. The art style should be highly detailed digital illustration with clean linework, reminiscent of Art Nouveau botanical diagrams meeting modern vector art. Strong contrast, flat background elements, and bold silhouettes for easy printing on fabric. Central composition, symmetrical, high contrast, intricate.
negative: blurry, low contrast, text, logo, watermark, signature, artifacts, bad anatomy, noise, poor quality, extra limbs, messy, photorealistic, messy background
